negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_b9a09222-114b-4bde-aa34-ca0828f3bd16
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out onto a street intersection in a suburban or urban setting. The scene is framed by a large multi-level building covered with greenery in the background, with trees lining both sides of the road. A "left-turn only" sign is prominently displayed above a red STOP sign. The road features a pedestrian crosswalk marked with white stripes, and the sky is clear with a few scattered clouds. A "ONE WAY" sign with an arrow pointing to the left and a "DO NOT BLOCK" sign are visible in front of the greenery. As the video progresses, a black car enters the frame from the right, driving past the STOP sign and continuing down the road. The car moves smoothly and steadily, remaining within the frame throughout the sequence. In the final frame, the black car is still visible, and its reflection can be seen on the windshield glass of the ego vehicle. The camera maintains a stable viewpoint, capturing the intersection and its surroundings as the vehicle moves forward.
